subject: Statistics
title: The Geometric Distribution
description: Learn The Geometric Distribution in one minute.

hook.text: Keep flipping a coin until you get heads. How many flips? Sometimes 1, sometimes 20.

buildup.text: The geometric distribution models the number of trials until the first success.

discovery.text: The probability drops fast. Needing 10 flips is a thousand times less likely than needing just one.

twist.text: It's memoryless. After 9 failures, the chance of succeeding next hasn't changed at all.

climax.text: Job applications, sales calls, and startup pitches all follow this pattern. Every try is a fresh start.

punchline.text: Keep trying. The next one could be the one.

quiz.question: What does the geometric distribution model?
options: The number of trials needed until the first success
The total number of successes in a fixed sample
The average of a continuous variable
